evals.name: typical-cfo-and-product
evals.prompt: I just learned that our enterprise customers using our SSO integration have 4x lower churn than non-SSO users. We have data showing they expand 2x more in year 2. How should I present this to our CFO and Head of Product to advocate for prioritizing SSO improvements?
expected_assertions: Output should have separate sections/rows for CFO and Head of Product
CFO section should reference CAC, payback, LTV, retention economics — NOT brand awareness
Product section should reference adoption, activation, expansion — frame SSO as growth lever
Each section should include a specific ask (budget allocation, roadmap slot)
Should NOT use generic 'Finance cares about ROI' platitudes

evals.name: vague-prompt
evals.prompt: Help me share our recent customer research with the rest of the leadership team
expected_assertions: Should ask clarifying questions OR proceed with default 4 functions (Finance/Product/Ops/HR)
If proceeding, should pick a sensible 'recent customer research' insight or note assumption
Output is structured per-function, not a generic 'tips for sharing research'

evals.name: edge-case-legal-and-it
evals.prompt: Our recent campaign for healthcare prospects had a 60% higher conversion rate when using customer testimonials with full name + photo. But we want to scale this. What does Legal and IT need to hear before we go big?
expected_assertions: Legal section: HIPAA/GDPR/PII consent management, written consent procedures, data-handling policies — NOT marketing benefits
IT section: storage/encryption of consent records, access control, integration with consent management platform — NOT campaign metrics
Should flag specific compliance risks (HIPAA for healthcare, GDPR for EU prospects)
Should NOT advocate for the campaign — should TRANSLATE risks/asks for Legal/IT to evaluate
